business.name: Fade & Blade Barber Studio
business.description: A modern neighborhood barbershop offering fades, classic cuts, beard styling, and hot towel shaves in a relaxed, male-focused environment.

services.name: Classic Fade
services.description: Skin or low fade with scissor work on top, finished with styling product.

services.name: Beard Trim & Shape
services.description: Beard line-up, trimming, and shaping with razor detailing.

services.name: Hot Towel Shave
services.description: Traditional straight-razor shave with hot towels and aftershave treatment.

services.name: Kids Cut (under 12)
services.description: Gentle haircut service for children under 12.

policies.cancellation: Appointments can be cancelled or rescheduled up to 4 hours in advance. Late cancellations or no-shows may be charged up to 50% of the service price.
policies.late_arrival: If you are more than 15 minutes late, we may need to shorten your service or reschedule to avoid delaying the next clients.
policies.walk_ins: Walk-ins are welcome, but availability is not guaranteed. Clients with appointments are always prioritized.
policies.payments: We accept cash, major credit cards, and common digital wallets.

faq.a: Yes, we accept walk-ins when a barber is available, but booking an appointment is recommended.

faq.q: Can I choose a specific barber?
faq.a: Yes, you may request a specific barber during booking and we will assign them if they are available.
Yes, we offer kids cuts for children under 12.
Yes, we have dedicated beard trims and beard styling services.

faq.q: Which barber is best for beard styling?
faq.a: Omar is our senior barber specializing in beard styling, fades, and line-ups.
